principles: Fusion over Imitation: Tactical Gym aesthetics mixed with Cyberpunk neons
Emotion First: Every interaction should feel 'heavy' and 'powerful'
Content is King: Data is the hero, not the container
Negative Space: Use black void to make neon pop

scale.h1: text-6xl md:text-8xl font-black uppercase tracking-tighter leading-none

typography.installation: Import from Google Fonts in index.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Barlow+Condensed:wght@400;700;900&family=Inter:wght@400;600&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400&display=swap');

rules: NO gradients on text unless it's a massive H1
Background is never pure black (#000000), use Obsidian (#0A0A0A)
Primary color (Neon Lime) is for Action only (Buttons, Active States)

grid_system.marketing: Grid Mode A: Tetris Grid (12 cols, wide gaps)
grid_system.dashboard: Grid Mode B: High Density Bento (4 cols, tight gaps)

variants.primary: bg-[#CCFF00] text-black hover:bg-[#B3E600] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider
variants.secondary: bg-white/10 text-white hover:bg-white/20 backdrop-blur-sm border border-white/10

inputs.class: bg-[#18181B] border-white/10 focus:border-[#CCFF00] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#CCFF00] text-white rounded-sm h-12

navigation.class: fixed top-6 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 w-[90%] max-w-5xl bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-full z-50 px-6 py-4 flex items-center justify-between

visual_enhancers.texture: Add subtle noise overlay to the background using a fixed opacity png or css pattern.
visual_enhancers.borders: Use 'Tracing Beam' effect on active dashboard cards.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Glow effects instead of drop shadows: box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(204, 255, 0, 0.2)
visual_enhancers.icons: Lucide React (default), Phosphor Icons (Bold/Fill weight for emphasis)

hero_background.description: Woman outlined in neon green light against black

abstract_energy.description: Abstract streaks of yellow and green light

gym_atmosphere.description: Dark gym interior with exercise equipment

instructions_to_main_agent: Configure Tailwind theme to match the Color Palette precisely.
Create a layout wrapper that applies the noise texture and background color globally.
Use Shadcn components but OVERRIDE their default styles to match the 'Electric Performance' theme.
Ensure ALL text has sufficient contrast. Use APCA check if unsure.
For the Workout Plan display, use a Masonry or Bento grid layout to show different days/exercises.
Implement a 'Progress Tracker' using Chart.js or Recharts with Neon lines on dark backgrounds.
Use the 'Tracing Beam' effect for the 'Generate Plan' button or loading state.
universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all.
You MUST NOT center align the app container.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations.
